testcase.name: test_get_sites

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'built_in': [{'active': True, 'id': 'seek', 'name': 'Seek', 'search_template': 'https://www.seek.com.au/{keyword}-jobs', ...}, {'active': True, 'id': 'indeed', 'name': 'Indeed AU', 'search_template': 'https://au.indeed.com/jobs?q={keyword}&l=Australia', ...}, {'active': True, 'id': 'linkedin', 'name': 'LinkedIn', 'search_template': 'https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/search/?keywords={keyword}&location=Australia', ...}, {'active': True, 'id': 'adzuna', 'name': 'Adzuna', 'search_template': 'https://www.adzuna.com.au/search?q={keyword}', ...}, {'active': True, 'id': 'careerone', 'name': 'CareerOne', 'search_template': 'https://www.careerone.com.au/jobs?search={keyword}', ...}, {'active': True, 'id': 'workforce_au', 'name': 'Workforce Australia', 'search_template': 'https://www.workforceaustralia.gov.au/individuals/training/search?keywords={keyword}', ...}, ...], 'custom': [{'careers_url': 'https://www.atlassian.com/company/careers/all-jobs', 'category': 'company', 'created_at': '2026-02-23T05:36:16.886326+00:00', 'id': '2e9e73e0-bf7f-4baa-858b-02b0c0be810f', ...}, {'careers_url': 'https://www.canva.com/careers/jobs', 'category': 'company', 'created_at': '2026-02-23T05:36:17.717057+00:00', 'id': '5533a2bd-441b-4cbb-a1ec-739d34161f48', ...}]}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_api.py:180: in test_get_sites assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'built_in': [{'active': True, 'id': 'seek', 'name': 'Seek', 'search_template': 'https://www.seek.com.au/{keyword}-jobs', ...}, {'active': True, 'id': 'indeed', 'name': 'Indeed AU', 'search_template': 'https://au.indeed.com/jobs?q={keyword}&l=Australia', ...}, {'active': True, 'id': 'linkedin', 'name': 'LinkedIn', 'search_template': 'https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/search/?keywords={keyword}&location=Australia', ...}, {'active': True, 'id': 'adzuna', 'name': 'Adzuna', 'search_template': 'https://www.adzuna.com.au/search?q={keyword}', ...}, {'active': True, 'id': 'careerone', 'name': 'CareerOne', 'search_template': 'https://www.careerone.com.au/jobs?search={keyword}', ...}, {'active': True, 'id': 'workforce_au', 'name': 'Workforce Australia', 'search_template': 'https://www.workforceaustralia.gov.au/individuals/training/search?keywords={keyword}', ...}, ...], 'custom': [{'careers_url': 'https://www.atlassian.com/company/careers/all-jobs', 'category': 'company', 'created_at': '2026-02-23T05:36:16.886326+00:00', 'id': '2e9e73e0-bf7f-4baa-858b-02b0c0be810f', ...}, {'careers_url': 'https://www.canva.com/careers/jobs', 'category': 'company', 'created_at': '2026-02-23T05:36:17.717057+00:00', 'id': '5533a2bd-441b-4cbb-a1ec-739d34161f48', ...}]}, list)
